ivs.recordingconfiguration.renditionconf: The RenditionConfiguration property type describes which renditions should be recorded for a stream.

ivs.recordingconfiguration.renditionconf.Description: A list of which renditions are recorded for a stream, if `renditionSelection` is `CUSTOM`; otherwise, this field is irrelevant. The selected renditions are recorded if they are available during the stream. If a selected rendition is unavailable, the best available rendition is recorded. For details on the resolution dimensions of each rendition, see [Auto-Record to Amazon S3](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/ivs/latest/userguide/record-to-s3.html).

The set of renditions are recorded for a stream. For `BASIC` channels, the `CUSTOM` value has no effect. If `CUSTOM` is specified, a set of renditions can be specified in the `renditions` field. Default: `ALL`.
